prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次为约3254→3020→3064→3259→4433名。2021–2024年位次在3000–3300名区间窄幅波动，2025年因青海省首次实施新高考（理 科改为物理类），位次大幅后移至4433名，较2024年后移约1174名，反映考试模式切换带来的竞争格局变化；该校在青海省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年48人 、2022年47人、2023年46人、2024年47人、2025年49人；2026年计划增至51人，较2025年扩招约4.1%，扩招幅度温和，对竞争有一定缓解作用但影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第63名，近年排名稳定在60–65名区间，属于中上游211层次；该校在近年声誉监测中未 出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第52位（评价"较热"），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度处于正常水平；未见投档线异常断档记录；第五轮学科 评估中，水利工程获评A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程获评A、环境科学与工程获评A，水利相关学科群实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度为"高热推荐"；土木建筑类为"分化观望"；本省2025年物理类考生约30457人，2026年总考生约48000人（按近年物理类占比 约64%估算，物理类约30700人），考生数略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；河海大学位于江苏南京，对青海考生属跨省报考，地 域偏好中等。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考切换后位次大幅后移的基准、2026年计划小幅扩 招约4.1%、本省物理类考生略有增加、学校声誉平稳等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年4433名基础上继续小幅后移，预测最低位次约4572名，区间4072–5072名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 3254 → 3020 → 3064 → 3259 → 4433. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 3000–3300 range. In 2025, due to Qinghai Province implementing the new college entrance examination for the first time (Science changed to Physics Category), the ranking significantly shifted backward to 4433, moving back about 1174 places compared to 2024, reflecting changes in competition patterns due to the exam mode switch. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai for Science/Physics Category: 48 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 47 in 2024, 49 in 2025. The 2026 plan increases to 51, an expansion of about 4.1% compared to 2025, which is moderate and has some alleviating effect on competition but limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 63rd, with recent rankings stable in the 60–65 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The university has not experienced significant negative public opinion events in recent reputation monitoring. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 52nd (rated as 'relatively hot'), with medium-to-high short video exposure, and application attention at a normal level. No abnormal gaps in admission score lines have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Water Resources Engineering received an A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering received an A, and Environmental Science and Engineering received an A. The water-related discipline cluster is outstanding, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are rated as 'highly recommended'. Civil Engineering and Architecture are rated as 'differentiated and wait-and-see'. In 2025, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province was about 30,457. In 2026, the total number of examinees is about 48,000 (estimated Physics Category about 30,700 based on recent proportion of about 64%), with a slight increase in examinees, leading to slightly intensified competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, which is an inter-provincial application for Qinghai examinees, with moderate regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant backward shift in rankings after the new college entrance exam switch in 2025, a small expansion of about 4.1% in the 2026 plan, a slight increase in local Physics Category examinees, and stable university reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 4433. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4572, with a range of 4072–5072.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (4072–5072), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4072), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5072), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, prioritizing majors under the A+ Water Resources Engineering discipline cluster (such as Agricultural Water Conservancy Engineering, Water Utility Engineering, etc.), balancing discipline strength and admission probability.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 735 → 1362 → 780 → 3087 → 1044. Rankings fluctuated sharply: a significant drop in 2022, a major rise in 2023, a sharp decline to 3087 in 2024 due to exam mode adjustment (liberal arts → history category), and a substantial rise to 1044 in 2025, reflecting instability during the initial transition of the new college entrance exam. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Qinghai Province: 4 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan is reduced to 4, a 20% decrease from 2025, indicating a significant reduction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. No significant negative public opinion incidents have been detected in recent reputation monitoring; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 52nd (rated as 'relatively hot'), with application attention at a normal level; no abnormal gaps in admission score lines have been recorded. Hohai University's liberal arts disciplines have not entered Class A evaluations, with strengths concentrated in engineering fields such as Hydraulic Engineering (A+), Civil Engineering (A), and Environmental Science and Engineering (A), which have limited direct appeal for liberal arts major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of accounting/finance/auditing is 'recommended'; foreign languages are 'generally wait-and-see'. In 2025, the province had approximately 17,212 history category examinees, and in 2026, the total examinees are about 48,000 (estimated history category about 17,300 based on recent proportion of about 36%), with examinee numbers basically flat. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, which is a cross-province application for Qinghai examinees, with moderate regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant upward shift in rankings in 2025, a 20% enrollment reduction in 2026 (intensified competition), basically flat examinee numbers, and stable university reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will slightly decline from the 2025 ranking of 1044, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 949, and a range of 778–1120.
